title: Out of window, no exception → deny recommended (policy-slider case)
customer_email: Hi, I bought ord_5005 about a month ago and I've changed my mind. Can I get a refund? — Lena

envelope.agent_summary: Out of the 30-day window with no defect, non-delivery, or billing error cited. Deny recommended.

policy_clauses_cited.quote: Refunds past 30 days require a valid exception code.

claims.statement: Order was placed outside the refund window
